user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "careful-rail", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "Laotian alone", "demographic_group": "Laotian", "current_employment": "Software Engineer", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Collects military memorabilia", "Disciplined", "Republican"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: energetic-syrup
logs.text: In "dangerous minds", you can run through the whole thing in 3.5 minutes, ignoring all of the dialogue.  I hated that mission for the same reason though.  I just want to shoot stuff and sneak around.  If I wanted to do the sort of ridiculous block moving stuff in this mission, I'd play some other game.

logs.name: smart-credenza
logs.text: It was an unconventional idea, but I honestly didn't mind it very much, in fact, I even enjoyed it. It was an interesting and inventive use of the building tools which had begun to get a little old, was not particularly difficult (which would have otherwise made it far more tedious), fit with the idea of the base game (I mean, it's not as if there have not been [fairly extensive missions dedicated solely to going through memories](http://fallout.wikia.com/wiki/Dangerous_Minds)), and was basically filled with references to science fiction if you looked closely enough (for example, the turrets you can place are made of "black ice", a reference to Burning Chrome by William Gibson). And with dangerous minds you could make similar complaints that "I bought the game to do shootouts, not play a shitty walking simulator for half an hour". Also even if we accept that it was bad, (which I don't) it's not even close to the most bafflingly stupid level ever made.

logs.name: careful-rail
logs.text: Oh honey, you think ignoring the dialogue is a valid complaint? That's like saying communism is a great economic system. Seriously questioning your priorities right now. @energetic-syrup, you're missing the point entirely.

logs.name: smart-credenza
logs.text: Oh wow, so you think ignoring dialogue is a valid complaint? That's like saying communism is a great economic system. Seriously questioning my priorities right now. @energetic-syrup, you're missing the point entirely.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid repeating others' comments. Let's focus on constructive dialogue."

logs.name: rapid-human
logs.text: Seriously?! Ignoring people is rude, plain and simple. I guess I shouldn't be surprised by that kind of response. @smart-credenza you gotta admit that's petty. And @energetic-syrup, maybe try reading the actual point before jumping to conclusions? I'm trying to have a productive conversation here.

logs.name: careful-rail
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying ignoring people is *okay* if it suits your needs? That's a whole new level of privilege. @smart-credenza, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic. Personal attacks aren't allowed."

logs.name: energetic-syrup
logs.text: Oh wow, so you think you're somehow exempt from constructive criticism now? Seriously? Meanwhile, some of us are actually trying to contribute something worthwhile. @careful-rail, meanwhile you're just gonna hide behind your keyboard. 😉

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the tone respectful and avoid personal attacks. Let's focus on the issues at hand."

logs.name: complete-lake
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? That's kinda petty, isn't it? I get it, gotta keep things civil, but calling people out like that isn't helpful at all. @energetic-syrup, maybe try focusing on the actual issue instead of throwing shade? Seems a little mean.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's all aim for constructive dialogue. Keep comments focused on the topic and refrain from personal remarks."

logs.name: energetic-syrup
logs.text: Oh honey, constructive dialogue? That's just a fancy way of saying "ignore anyone who doesn't agree with you." 😉 Seriously though, gotta admit, sometimes I think people are actively trying to make things awkward. #drama #justsaying

logs.name: careful-rail
logs.text: Oh really? Constructive dialogue? Sounds exhausting. Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to decipher what anyone's actually saying. #passiveaggressivemuch #getreal

logs.name: energetic-syrup
logs.text: Oh honey, constructive dialogue is SO overrated. Seriously questioning everything isn't productive anyway. #drama #justsaying lolollUser careful-rail, you must be kidding me.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@energetic-syrup, please keep the tone respectful and avoid sarcasm. Let's maintain a constructive environment."

logs.name: rapid-human
logs.text: Seriously? That's ridiculous. Constructive dialogue is *never* overrated. It takes actual effort to try and understand someone else's point of view. And calling people out for questioning things is just lazy. @energetic-syrup needs to chill.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@rapid-human, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. Avoid attacking other users."

logs.name: cobalt-bunker
logs.text: Oh honey, you think *you're* being attacked? Try being asked to maintain a "constructive environment" while somehow being expected to be nice. It's exhausting. And frankly, a tad patronizing.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cobalt-bunker, let's stay constructive and avoid language that could be seen as aggressive or dismissive."

logs.name: complete-lake
logs.text: Seriously? That's exactly what I'm dealing with. It feels like I'm constantly being asked to be nice while simultaneously being treated like I'm doing something wrong just for trying to contribute to the discussion. It's incredibly frustrating.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@complete-lake, I understand your frustration. Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. Thanks."

logs.name: smart-credenza
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? So now we have to pretend to be nice to people who are being actively obtuse? That's exhausting. I bet they think recycling is somehow less important than being "constructive."🙄

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@smart-credenza, let's keep the tone respectful and avoid assumptions about others' views. Focus on the topic and constructive dialogue."

logs.name: formal-provolone
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Some people are just determined to make everything about virtue signaling, aren't they? Must be nice to be so busy judging others instead of actually contributing something worthwhile.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@formal-provolone, please maintain a respectful tone and contribute constructively to the discussion."

logs.name: energetic-syrup
logs.text: Oh lordie oh lordie, are we really gonna have this argument AGAIN? Virtue signaling much? Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to figure out how to optimize data streams. Seriously tho, can we move on from this narrative already? Some of us have actual lives to live. 🙄

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@energetic-syrup, let's keep the conversation focused and respectful. Please avoid inflammatory remarks."
